title: Preparation of mouse tissue homogenates for RT-QuIC assay
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"29jbe","text":"This protocol is designed for a standardized and efficient procedure to homogenize mouse tissue, conducive for RT-QuIC analysis. The process involves treating samples with PBS mixed with Triton-X100, followed by homogenization using a prob-tip sonicator. Centrifugation is then employed to remove detergent-insoluble fraction, optimizing the tissue for subsequent \nanalysis. The use of Triton-X100, a mild detergent, ensures the release of alpha-synuclein aggregates, enhancing signal specificity without compromising structural integrity. The protocol's significance lies in addressing the critical need for a reliable method in preparing mouse tissue for RT-QuIC analysis, with the distinct signal generated in assays validating its efficacy. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"6uglc","text":"The tissues need to be perfused with fresh PBS and flash-frozen in liquid nitrogen","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Measure the weight of each eppendorf tube using analytical scale and label the tube with assigned number Protein LoBind Tubes, 1.5 mL Eppendorf Catalog #0030108116 Low Protein Binding Collection Tubes (1.5 mL) Thermo Fisher Catalog #90411

Cut a tissue slice (around 100-200 mg) with a disposable blade on a plastic plate lid wrapped in a foil (all on ice), transfer to the Eppendorf protein low-binding tube (with known weight) biohazard; place disposable blades into biohazard needle container; material should be thrown away into biohazard bags previously placed into tube or a 15 mL falcon (secondary container)
Measure the weight of the tissue piece in a tube using analytical scales Subtract weight of the tube to obtain the final weight of the brain slice (indicate the weight in the table)

Add 20 vol weight/volume of PBS buffer containing 1%Tx100 and protease/phosphatase inhibitors ( Roche PhosSTOP EasyPack Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #4906837001 , Roche cOmplete Tablets EDTA-free, EasyPack Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #4693132001 (for example, 100 mg – 5 mL) - transfer to 15 mL falcon tube;

Sonicate tissue samples for 00:01:00 , 5 sec ON and 15 sec OFF ( On ice ); Use 0.16 inch microtip for homogenization Fisherbrand Model 120 Sonic Dismembrator (Sonicator, Fisherbrand, FB120110, Equipped with 1/8" probe, https://www.fishersci.com/shop/products/fisher-scientific-model-120-sonic-dismembrator-4/p-3974654 )
Spin down sonicated samples at 10.000 x g, , , 4 °C , 00:10:00
Transfer supernatant into a new 15 mL falcon tube;
Aliquot the samples in lobind eppendorf Protein LoBind Tubes, 1.5 mL Eppendorf Catalog #0030108116 tubes and store at -70 °C
